notes.intent_plain: Improve pattern recognition so trade outcomes are higher quality (better wins, smaller losses, better timing) — not maximizing raw win count or a fixed PnL.
notes.emphasis: Outcome quality from pattern-aware behavior; engine stays neutral.

evaluation_window.referee_note: Intent: contiguous 12 calendar months of SOLUSDT 5m bars per GAME_SPEC. Replay currently uses the DB slice configured by ingest; wire slicing here when supported. Required vs optional scenario keys: see renaissance_v4/game_theory/scenario_contract.py module docstring.

agent_explanation.hypothesis: Replace with one testable sentence about pattern outcome quality vs baseline on the same bars (e.g. better expectancy per trade, exit efficiency, or loss control — not a fixed PnL or win-rate target).
